value.string:
Lists all available ERP5 portal types with their descriptions.
 
 Results are returned in two formats:
 1. 'content' field: Human-readable formatted text showing each portal type with:
 - Portal type name followed by a separator line (---)
 - A note if querying the portal type is not allowed
 - A note if querying the portal type is restricted to returning the uid
 - Brief description of what the portal type represents
 - Empty descriptions shown as blank lines
 
 2. 'structuredContent' field: JSON array conforming to the outputSchema where each item contains:
 - id: string - Portal type ID (unique identifier)
 - allowed: boolean - Whether it is allowed to query this portal type
 - restricted:boolean - Whether the portal type is restricted. For restricted portal types, only the uid can be queried
 - description: string - Detailed description (if available)
 
 This tool helps discover what document types exist in the system before using MCP_getPortalTypeSchema or MCP_listPortalType. The structured format provides machine-readable access to portal type IDs and their descriptions for programmatic use.
 
 This tool is READ-ONLY and is NON-DESTRUCTIVE.
